c_option_grammar.cluster_rule: a short option cluster containing c (for example -lc, -xec) matches
c_option_grammar.value_options_before_c: any option-like word may precede; a word that is option-like but not statically resolvable refuses as dispatcher-selector-unresolved
c_option_grammar.double_dash: -- ends option parsing; -c after -- does not match
c_option_grammar.exe_and_case: head matched on casefolded basename with optional .exe suffix

pinned_false_positive: bash -c 'echo ok' doc-lattice refuses although the operand is $0
